column245: Kevin has been in the business 25 years.  He has owned his own practice since 2003. Does 3-4 million in FIA per year.  Mostly referrals & word of mouth, little to no marketing involved.  Wishes we had more flyers/advertising pieces that he could use with his customers.  for example, the lost decade piece would be extremely helpful for him.  does prepare taxes so uses the tax return as an approach to have a conversation about retirement dollars as well.  also made a suggestion of cleaning up our client statements & including the vested bonus on allocation letters as it draws unwarranted questions from clients. also thinks our vegas meeting / power producer pow wow should be rotated to east coast, not just vegas.  also incorporate golf outings and other events instead of jam packed meeting after meeting

column245: Dwight travels across 4 states (OK, TN, AR, LA) and mostly sells FIA.  He is a Regional Director, RD, with AIP.  Sells 60 - 70% F&G.  He is a $5-$7 million producer per year. Typically closes 6 out of 20 leads per month.  It is also important to Keith that our rating increases to at least an A-.  He's lost a couple deals because of our rating and would feel much more comfortable sending more business our way with that rating.

column245: Rick does $4-5 million in FIA annually.  Senior market is his niche, 70 - 85 years old.  He targets seniors who have annuities.  He does advertising in the paper & magazines & senior centers.  Gets the best response (seasonally) with about 20-25 leads in a month.  June or July that could be 10. Does write Equitrust too in order to mitigate insurance risk.  Likes our products a lot but does make decisions based on comp too.  Really likes working with KT and wants to hear marketing ideas in the future.

Craig and his partner David write $50 million in FIA annually.  3 million in Life.  They are connected with Fortune 500 companies &  High Net Worth Clients from skilled professions: i.e. doctors, lawyers, etc.  Their business is nearly 100% referral based.  Their main carriers are Allianz, AVIVA Annexus & us.  They will push us more when our rating increases.
